dsl_rule.translation_notes: Broadening Formation breakout detected via Donchian upper band breakout (price_pos_20 alternative would be price_pos_20 > 0.8). Entry requires uptrend confirmation via ADX > 25. Average rise of 28% suggests ~60 day holding period. Exit on Donchian lower band breach (pattern failure). Stop loss set conservatively at 5% given 20% failure rate within 5% move. Pattern-specific statistical data (failure rates at various levels) noted but not directly translatable to entry/exit rules.

source_rule_text: Broadening Formation, Right-Angled and Descending - Bull Market Up Breakout
